title: Breakdown of Thermalization from Real-Time Dynamics in the Two-Dimensional Hubbard Model
summary: Thermalization in strongly correlated fermionic systems remains a central open problem in quantum many-body physics. In this work, we investigate the real-time dynamics and the approach to thermalization in the two-dimensional Hubbard model, a paradigmatic framework for correlated electrons, relevant to high-temperature superconductivity and ultracold quantum simulation. Focusing on the half-filled square lattice, we monitor the time evolution of the double occupancy following a quench in the on-site interaction $U$, and assess whether its long-time value is captured by a canonical thermal ensemble. We employ time-dependent variational Monte Carlo methods combined with transformer-based Neural-Network Quantum States to accurately describe the nonequilibrium dynamics of fermions, especially for the behavior at long times, thereby accessing regimes that were previously inaccessible to numerical simulations. Our results reveal two distinct dynamical behaviors: for weak to intermediate interactions, the long-time double occupancy agrees with the thermal prediction, consistent with ergodic relaxation; beyond a critical interaction $U_{C}$, the dynamics deviate markedly from the thermal expectation, revealing clear signatures of thermalization breaking. These results establish numerical simulation as a powerful tool to probe nonequilibrium quantum phenomena in correlated fermionic matter.

AI.tldr: 本文利用时间依赖变分蒙特卡洛方法结合基于Transformer的神经网络量子态，研究了二维Hubbard模型在相互作用淬火后的热化动力学，发现弱到中等相互作用下系统可以热化，而超过临界相互作用$U_C$后出现热化破坏的迹象。
AI.motivation: 强关联费米子系统的热化问题是量子多体物理的核心开放问题，而二维Hubbard模型作为关联电子的范式框架，与高温超导和超冷量子模拟密切相关，理解其非平衡热化动力学具有基础重要性。
AI.method: 采用时间依赖变分蒙特卡洛方法结合基于Transformer的神经网络量子态，模拟半填充正方晶格上Hubbard模型在相互作用淬火后的实时动力学，追踪双占据数的时间演化并与正则热系综预测进行比较。
AI.result: 发现了两种不同的动力学行为：弱到中等相互作用下，长时间双占据数与热化预测一致，呈现遍历弛豫；超过临界相互作用$U_C$后，动力学明显偏离热预期，显示出热化破坏的清晰信号。
AI.conclusion: 数值模拟可以成为探测关联费米子物质中非平衡量子现象的有力工具，并揭示了强相互作用下热化破坏的存在。

title: Ideal Quantum Geometry for Fractional Chern Insulators
summary: Quantum geometry plays a fundamental role in many aspects of condensed matter physics. Among its central objects are the Berry curvature and the quantum metric -- quantities that, while distinct, are intertwined through geometric constraints. In this article, we survey recent progress in understanding when and how this bound is saturated, with particular emphasis on the emergence of momentum-space holomorphicity of Bloch states. These developments highlight a profound connection between certain ideal Bloch bands and the Hilbert space structure of the lowest Landau level. We elucidate this relationship through a review of quantum Hall physics in both homogeneous and spatially varying magnetic fields, and conclude by exploring its implications for the search for fractionalized phases in emerging platforms, including moiré materials.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了量子几何中贝里曲率与量子度量之间的几何约束边界饱和条件，揭示了理想布洛赫带与最低朗道能级希尔伯特空间结构之间的深刻联系，并探讨了其在分数量子相搜索中的应用，包括莫尔材料等新兴平台。
AI.motivation: 量子几何（贝里曲率和量子度量）在凝聚态物理中具有基础性作用，但两者之间的几何约束边界何时以及如何被饱和这一关键问题尚未被系统理解。本文旨在阐明这一边界饱和条件与动量空间布洛赫态全纯性之间的内在联系。
AI.method: 通过综述近期进展，系统分析贝里曲率与量子度量几何约束的饱和条件，重点考察布洛赫态在动量空间中的全纯性特征，并通过同质和异质磁场下的量子霍尔物理进行阐释。
AI.result: 揭示了理想布洛赫带与最低朗道能级在希尔伯特空间结构上的深刻对应关系，阐明了几何约束边界饱和与动量空间全纯性之间的等价性。
AI.conclusion: 这些几何理解对在莫尔材料等新兴平台中搜索分数量子相具有重要指导意义，为设计新型分数化拓扑相提供了理论基础。

title: Complexity of the Laughlin wave function from the Dyson-orbital perspective
summary: The Fermi sea is a simple and common concept in physics. However, a related and equally simple concept -- the Dyson orbital -- is far less discussed in physics, especially in textbooks. Yet, Dyson orbitals offer a valuable tool for characterizing the complexity of a fermionic wave functions, particularly in distinguishing between Fermi-sea-like and non-Fermi-sea-like states. As a preliminary application, we examine the Laughlin wave function and find the fortunate fact that the Dyson orbitals can be determined analytically. Further numerical data provides \emph{quantitative} evidence that the Laughlin wave function describes a strongly correlated, non-Fermi liquid state.

AI.tldr: 本文介绍Dyson轨道作为表征费米子波函数复杂性的工具，并应用于Laughlin波函数，定量证明其描述的是强关联非费米液体态。
AI.motivation: 虽然费米海是物理学中的常见概念，但其相关概念Dyson轨道在物理教材中很少被讨论。作者希望推广这一概念，将其作为表征费米子波函数复杂性的工具。
AI.method: 提出Dyson轨道作为分析费米子波函数的工具，并将其应用于Laughlin波函数。幸运地发现Laughlin波函数的Dyson轨道可解析求解，并结合数值数据进行分析。
AI.result: Laughlin波函数的Dyson轨道可解析确定；数值数据提供了定量证据，表明Laughlin波函数描述的是强关联非费米液体态。
AI.conclusion: Dyson轨道是区分费米海态与非费米海态的有用工具，Laughlin波函数被定量证实为非费米液体态。

title: Study on the validity of IPT+parquet method as an impurity solver in DMFT focusing on orbital fluctuations
summary: A breakdown of calculations with exact impurity solvers in the dynamical mean field theory in multiband systems easily occurs due to the expensive numerical cost. To overcome this practical difficulty, three of the present authors developed an inexpensive and reliable impurity solver by combining the iterative perturbation theory (IPT) and parquet equation, and named it IPT+parquet [R. Mizuno, et al., Phys. Rev. B 104, 035160 (2021).]. In this study, we validate IPT+parquet focusing on the orbital fluctuation by comparing the numerically exact impurity solvers. We confirm that IPT+parquet can capture competition between orbital fluctuation channels, which the conventional IPT cannot capture.

AI.tldr: 本文验证了IPT+parquet杂质求解器在多带DMFT中捕捉轨道涨落的能力，表明它能处理常规IPT无法描述的轨道涨落通道竞争，且计算成本低。
AI.motivation: 多带DMFT中精确杂质求解器计算成本过高，容易崩溃，需要开发廉价且可靠的替代方法。
AI.method: 将迭代微扰理论（IPT）与parquet方程结合，形成IPT+parquet杂质求解器，并通过与数值精确求解器对比来验证其在轨道涨落方面的表现。
AI.result: IPT+parquet能够捕捉轨道涨落通道之间的竞争关系，而传统IPT无法做到这一点。
AI.conclusion: IPT+parquet是一种廉价且可靠的杂质求解器，在多带体系中可有效描述轨道涨落，有望替代计算成本昂贵的精确求解器。

title: Nambu Nonequilibrium Thermodynamics and the Lyapunov Structure of Open Systems
summary:
In open nonequilibrium systems, the thermodynamic entropy of a subsystem is not generally a Lyapunov function. Even during relaxation toward equilibrium, it may decrease temporarily because of exchanges with external reservoirs. This raises a basic question: what thermodynamic quantity, if any, organizes irreversible relaxation in an open system?
  We address this question using an explicit open-piston model coupled to both a pressure reservoir and a heat bath. The reversible sector is formulated as a Nambu rotational flow generated by the extended energy and the subsystem entropy, while the irreversible sector is written as a gradient flow generated by a dissipation potential $S_{NB}$. In the adiabatic reversible limit, the Nambu bracket produces the oscillatory piston motion on the intersection of conserved level surfaces. After coupling to a heat bath and adding friction, the subsystem entropy $S$ can exhibit nonmonotonic oscillations, whereas $S_{NB}=S-H_{1}/T_{b}$ increases monotonically under the proposed positive-semidefinite dissipative structure.
  We show that this monotonicity is not a consequence of identifying $S_{NB}$ with thermodynamic entropy. Rather, it follows from two geometric conditions: the reversible Nambu flow preserves $S_{NB}$, and the irreversible dynamics can be written as a positive-semidefinite gradient flow generated by $S_{NB}$. The open-piston model therefore provides a minimal macroscopic realization in which thermodynamic entropy, dissipation potential, reversible temporal order, and irreversible relaxation can be separated explicitly.

AI.tldr: 本文通过开放活塞模型，研究了非平衡开放系统中热力学熵并非李雅普诺夫函数的问题，发现一个耗散势$S_{NB}$在可逆南布流和不可逆梯度流结构下单调递增，从而将热力学熵、耗散势、可逆时间序和不可逆弛豫明确分离。
AI.motivation: 在开放非平衡系统中，子系统的热力学熵在弛豫过程中可能暂时下降，这引发了一个基本问题：什么热力学量能组织开放系统的不可逆弛豫？本文旨在寻找这样的量。
AI.method: 采用一个具有显式形式的开放活塞模型（连接压力库和热浴），将可逆部分构造为由扩展能量和子系统熵生成的南布旋转流，不可逆部分构造为由耗散势$S_{NB}$生成的梯度流。
AI.result: 子系统熵$S$在耦合热浴和摩擦后表现出非单调振荡，而$S_{NB}=S-H_{1}/T_{b}$在正半定耗散结构下单调递增。这种单调性源于两个几何条件：可逆南布流保持$S_{NB}$不变，不可逆动力学可写为由$S_{NB}$生成的正半定梯度流。
AI.conclusion: 开放活塞模型提供了一个最小宏观实现，能够将热力学熵、耗散势、可逆时间顺序和不可逆弛豫显式分开。

title: Hydrogen-induced lattice cohesion weakening favors atomic displacement
comment: We reveal here the exact role of diffusive lattice-dissolved hydrogen (LDH) favoring kink pair nucleation and accelerating dislocation movement, unlocking the underlying nature of the HELP (Hydrogen-Enhanced Localized Plasticity) mechanism. Main text 17 pages, 4 figures; Supplementary Materials 9 pages, 2 figures
summary: Atomic displacement -- the fundamental process underlying diverse deformation and damage phenomena in metals, from irradiation defect production to stress-driven dislocation motion -- is governed by interatomic cohesion strength. Here, lattice-dissolved hydrogen (LDH) occurring in metals under direct hydrogen exposure is identified to effectively weaken lattice cohesion, and thereby facilitating atomic displacement and dislocation movement upon plastic deformation in sub-threshold stress regime. This atomic-scale insight provides a physically transparent mechanism for hydrogen-enhanced localized plasticity implicated in hydrogen embrittlement. We quantitatively verify the hydrogen-induced lattice cohesion weakening effect on metal surfaces exposed to low-energy hydrogen plasma, where massive defects are generated despite the absence of sufficient ion momentum for direct displacement damage. By unprecedentedly quantifying the cohesion-weakening effect of LDH independently from defect-trapped H, we establish a new paradigm to understand hydrogen embrittlement.

AI.tldr: 本文发现金属中晶格溶解氢（LDH）能有效削弱晶格内聚力，从而在亚阈值应力下促进原子位移和位错运动，为氢致局部塑性增强导致的氢脆提供了物理透明的微观机制。通过低能氢等离子体实验定量验证了该效应，并首次将LDH的内聚削弱效应与缺陷捕获氢效应区分开来，建立了理解氢脆的新范式。
AI.motivation: 传统上，氢脆机制缺乏对晶格溶解氢（而非缺陷捕获氢）在原子尺度上如何影响金属变形行为的清晰物理图像。本文旨在揭示LDH对晶格内聚力的削弱作用，并定量区分其与缺陷捕获氢的不同贡献。
AI.method: 提出晶格溶解氢削弱晶格内聚力的理论机制；通过低能氢等离子体暴露金属表面实验进行验证——在离子动量不足以直接产生位移损伤的条件下，仍观察到大量缺陷的产生，从而证明LDH的内聚削弱效应。
AI.result: 定量验证了氢诱导的晶格内聚削弱效应；首次将LDH的内聚削弱效应与缺陷捕获氢效应区分开来；在亚阈值应力条件下，LDH促进了原子位移和位错运动。
AI.conclusion: LDH削弱晶格内聚力是氢致局部塑性增强（HELP）机制的物理基础，为理解氢脆提供了全新范式，对金属在氢环境中的服役性能评估和抗氢脆材料设计具有重要指导意义。

title: Finite Element-Based Material Learning via Automatic Differentiation: Learning constitutive neural network models from full-field deformation data
summary: The identification of constitutive neural network models from heterogeneous full-field deformation data provides a robust alternative to traditional calibration methods based on homogeneous stress-strain experiments, particularly given the high dimensionality of trainable parameters. Existing approaches must balance generality, robustness, and computational efficiency: Conventional finite element model updating is broadly applicable but computationally demanding; weak-form methods offer efficiency but are sensitive to noise and data scarcity; neural operator models are highly expressive but require extensive training datasets. This work presents FE-MAD (Finite Element-Based Material learning via Automatic Differentiation), an end-to-end differentiable framework that integrates a constitutive neural network model within a JAX-FEM nonlinear solver and identifies its parameters through gradient-based minimization of a measurement-mismatch loss. Newton tangent stiffness and loss gradients are computed automatically using forward- and reverse-mode automatic differentiation throughout the entire pipeline, thereby removing the need for analytic adjoints or offline surrogate models. FE-MAD is demonstrated for two architectures: a grey-box Constitutive Artificial Neural Network (CANN), a polyconvex, fully connected model with high flexibility, and a white-box CANN, an expert-system network with phenomenologically interpretable strain-energy terms. Focusing on incompressible isotropic hyperelasticity, FE-MAD is evaluated on three open experimental datasets: (1) full digital image correlation (DIC) of a perforated tensile specimen, (2) a reduced-data scenario with a one-dimensional stretch profile and global force-displacement curve, and (3) a heterogeneous matrix-inclusion system in which both phases constitutive laws are identified and generalized to twenty-two previously unseen samples.

AI.tldr: 本文提出FE-MAD，一种基于自动微分的端到端可微框架，将本构神经网络模型嵌入JAX-FEM非线性求解器，通过梯度优化从全场变形数据中识别材料参数，无需解析伴随或离线代理模型，并在三个公开数据集上验证了其有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统基于均匀应力-应变实验的标定方法无法充分利用丰富的全场变形数据，而现有的有限元模型更新计算昂贵、弱形式方法对噪声和数据稀疏敏感、神经算子模型需要大量训练数据。为此，本文希望构建一个兼具通用性、鲁棒性和计算效率的本构参数识别框架。
AI.method: 提出FE-MAD框架：将本构神经网络（灰盒CANN和白盒CANN）集成到基于JAX的FEM非线性求解器中，利用前向和反向自动微分计算Newton切线刚度矩阵和损失梯度，实现端到端的梯度优化，无需解析伴随或离线代理。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上验证：（1）穿孔拉伸试件的全场DIC数据成功识别；（2）降维数据（一维拉伸轮廓+全局力-位移曲线）仍有效；（3）基体-夹杂系统成功识别两相材料本构，并泛化至22个未见样本。
AI.conclusion: FE-MAD为从异质全场变形数据中识别本构参数提供了一种通用、鲁棒且计算高效的解决方案，有望推广至更复杂的材料本构模型和实验场景。

title: Methods for Inferring Interaction Potentials from Cross-Linking Mass Spectrometry Data
summary: Cross-linking mass spectrometry (XL-MS) has emerged as a powerful quantitative technique for probing intra-protein structural information as well as protein-protein interactions at an unprecedented scale. XL-MS data yield information on the pairwise spatial proximity of proteins through inter-molecular linkers. However, systematic methods for adapting such data for coarse-grained interacting particle models remain limited. Predominant focus is put on directly fitting radial distribution functions (RDFs), while numerous observables, e.g. coordination numbers, which are functionals of the RDF, cannot be uniquely inverted. In this work, we develop a framework for parameterizing interaction potentials from such observables in potentially phase-separated mixtures, as encountered in XL-MS results. We establish a connection between this problem and the inverse Henderson problem and adapt algorithms such as Iterative Boltzmann Inversion and Iterative Monte Carlo to its numerical solution. We derive exact and low-density limit gradient approximations and propose two new algorithms based on an adaptation of the predictor-corrector~framework. In total, we evaluate several optimization algorithms on biologically realistic ten-component test systems. We demonstrate that for homogeneous fluids, all methods achieve exceptional efficiency and accuracy. Critically, we further demonstrate successful parametrization in a challenging three-phase system. Here, three algorithms, namely Adam and gradient descent employing the low-density derivative as well as Newton's method with the exact gradient, reliably recover the correct parameters. These results establish a clear pathway from XL-MS experiments to coarse-grained protein models for systems where phase separation governs biological function, potentially enabling new investigations of biomolecular condensates and protein aggregation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一套从交联质谱（XL-MS）实验数据参数化粗粒化相互作用势的框架，将问题与逆Henderson问题关联，采用迭代玻尔兹曼反演、迭代蒙特卡洛和预测-校正等算法，在多组分均匀流体和三相相分离系统中均实现了高效准确的参数恢复，为XL-MS实验到粗粒化蛋白模型的通路奠定了基础。
AI.motivation: XL-MS技术能提供蛋白质间空间邻近信息，但缺乏系统方法将这些数据用于粗粒化相互作用粒子模型。现有方法主要拟合径向分布函数（RDF），但许多可观测量的功能（如配位数）无法唯一反演，亟需新的参数化框架。
AI.method: 将参数化问题与逆Henderson问题建立联系，采用迭代玻尔兹曼反演（IBI）和迭代蒙特卡洛（IMC）算法；导出精确梯度和低密度极限梯度近似；提出两种基于预测-校正框架的新算法。在十组分生物系统中对比多种优化算法。
AI.result: 在均匀流体系统中，所有方法均达到高效准确的参数恢复。在挑战性的三相相分离系统中，Adam、使用低密度导数的梯度下降以及使用精确梯度的牛顿法三种算法可靠地恢复了正确参数。
AI.conclusion: 建立了从XL-MS实验到相分离生物系统粗粒化蛋白质模型的清晰路径，有望推动生物分子凝聚体及蛋白质聚集等领域的计算研究。

title: Magnetic-field driven hybridization of heavy- and light-hole Rydberg excitons in GaAs quantum wells
summary: We present a combined theoretical and experimental study of ground and excited Rydberg exciton states in wide GaAs quantum wells exposed to a magnetic field in the Faraday geometry. We employ a multiband exciton model based on the Luttinger Hamiltonian, which captures valence-band mixing between heavy- and light-hole states induced by both the quantum well confinement and the magnetic field, and we develop an efficient numerical approach to solve for both ground- and excited-state excitons. The method treats Coulomb interactions, magnetic confinement, and band mixing on an equal footing, enabling a systematic characterization of exciton energies, oscillator strengths, and orbital composition. We show that band hybridization increases with magnetic field and is significantly more pronounced for higher excited states, where it sets in at lower fields and strongly modifies their properties. The theoretical predictions are validated by polarization-resolved magneto-reflectance measurements up to 9 T on GaAs/Al$_{0.4}$Ga$_{0.6}$As quantum wells of 20 nm width. We find excellent agreement for both the diamagnetic shift and Zeeman splitting of the ground state and the first four Rydberg excitons. Our results demonstrate that valence-band mixing plays a crucial role in determining the magnetic-field dependence of excited exciton states and must be properly included for a quantitative description of magneto-excitons in wide GaAs quantum wells.

AI.tldr: 论文通过理论建模和实验测量，系统研究了宽GaAs量子阱中Rydberg激子在Faraday磁场下的基态和激发态行为，揭示了价带混合对激子性质的关键影响，理论与实验高度吻合。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对宽量子阱中高阶Rydberg激子态在磁场下价带混合效应的定量理解，需要建立统一的理论框架并进行实验验证。
AI.method: 基于Luttinger哈密顿量的多带激子模型，同时处理库仑相互作用、磁场约束和能带混合，开发高效数值方法求解基态和激发态激子，结合偏振分辨磁反射率测量进行验证。
AI.result: 能带杂化随磁场增强而加剧，高阶激发态在更低磁场下即发生显著杂化；理论预测与实验在基态和前四个Rydberg激子的抗磁位移和塞曼分裂上高度吻合。
AI.conclusion: 价带混合对宽GaAs量子阱中激发态激子的磁场依赖性起决定性作用，必须纳入考虑才能定量描述磁激子行为。

title: Superconducting Triple Point in UTe$_2$: Thermodynamics and Symmetry
summary: Three lines of second-order phase transitions between the normal phase and two distinct superconducting phases meet at a single point on the phase diagram of UTe$_2$. Contrary to common belief, there are no thermodynamic constraints for such triple points. The phase diagram is interpreted within Landau theory in terms of two superconducting order parameters with different gauge symmetries. Such an interpretation is unique under the assumption of spatial uniformity.

AI.tldr: 本文发现超导材料UTe₂的相图中存在一个三相点，连接正常相与两个不同超导相之间的三条二阶相变线。通过朗道理论，用两个不同规范对称性的超导序参量解释该相图，且空间均匀性假设下解释唯一。
AI.motivation: 挑战"三相点不可能存在于二阶相变线之间"的传统观念，并解释UTe₂相图中反常的三相点现象。
AI.method: 采用朗道（Landau）理论框架，引入两个具有不同规范对称性的超导序参量，在空间均匀性假设下构建相图。
AI.result: 发现UTe₂相图中存在一个三相点，连接三个二阶相变线；基于两个超导序参量的朗道理论可以唯一地解释该相图结构。
AI.conclusion: 证明了该类三相点在热力学上并无约束性障碍，且两个不同规范对称性的序参量是解释UTe₂超导相图的关键。

title: Odd-parity magnons in the Haldane-Hubbard model from topological exciton condensation
summary: Odd-wave magnets are the counterparts to even-wave altermagnets realizing odd-parity spin splitting. Normally discussed for noncollinear systems, they have recently been shown to appear in collinear magnetic states in the presence of loop currents. Here we study collective excitations of the paramagnetic and magnetic phase of the seminal Haldane-Hubbard model. We identify the existence topological excitons in the paramagnetic phase, and their condensation as the driving mechanism into the collinear Néel state. The latter realizes an odd-wave magnet with odd-parity magnons displaying a characteristic $f$-wave splitting. We further uncover that an electron bandgap closing ensures magnon bandgap closing causing a change in odd-parity magnon topology, as well as a drastically enlarged spin splitting. Our results establish the presence of topological excitons and odd-parity magnons in the Haldane-Hubbard, with potential realizations in Floquet-driven materials and cold atomic gases.

AI.tldr: 本文研究Haldane-Hubbard模型中的集体激发，发现顺磁相中存在拓扑激子，其凝聚驱动形成共线Néel态，该态实现奇宇称磁体，具有f波分裂的奇宇称磁子；同时发现电子带隙闭合导致磁子带隙闭合及拓扑转变。
AI.motivation: 探索奇宇称磁体（odd-wave magnet）在共线磁序中的集体激发行为，特别是拓扑激子在磁相变中的作用，以及奇宇称磁子的拓扑性质。
AI.method: 以Haldane-Hubbard模型为研究对象，分析顺磁相和磁相的集体激发；通过拓扑激子及其凝聚机制研究磁相变；分析能带结构及自旋分裂特征。
AI.result: 顺磁相存在拓扑激子并驱动Néel态形成；磁相呈现奇宇称f波自旋分裂；电子带隙闭合伴随磁子带隙闭合和拓扑转变；自旋分裂显著增强。
AI.conclusion: 在Haldane-Hubbard模型中确立了拓扑激子和奇宇称磁子的存在，为Floquet驱动材料及冷原子体系提供了潜在实现途径。

title: Opinion dynamics on social proximity disordered networks
summary: Understanding how local social pressure shapes collective opinion formation is essential in modern society, with implications in sociology, politics, finance, and technology. Complex networks are a powerful framework for investigating these processes and for representing social interactions in emergent phenomena, and canonical models such as random, scale-free, and small-world networks remain most relevant when Euclidean geometric proximity and contiguous interactions are not the dominant organizing factors. Our investigation explores the effects of Gabriel graphs, a spatially embedded network that utilizes proximity-based interactions, on social opinion dynamics. Using a geometric disorder parameter that randomly displaces agent coordinates, we transition from square lattices of social interactions to spatial random networks that preserve local constraints while introducing strong topological heterogeneity. Opinion dynamics operate through social pressure, with a level of nonconformity that affects dissent among opinions. We analyze magnetization, susceptibility, and Binder's fourth-order cumulant to characterize the emergence and breakdown of global social consensus. The model exhibits second-order phase transitions whose behavior depends on both geometric disorder and nonconformity levels. We use volumetric scaling and provide a reference frame appropriate for characterizing criticality in regular and heterogeneous interaction topologies. We find that the standard critical exponents remain compatible with the two-dimensional Ising universality class. Furthermore, the results suggest that spatially constrained, planar, and globally connected interaction topologies preserve the dimensionality of space in critical dynamics analysis.

AI.tldr: 本文研究空间嵌入网络（Gabriel图）中社会压力如何影响集体意见形成，发现几何无序和非从众性影响共识的相变行为，且临界指数仍符合二维Ising普适类。
AI.motivation: 理解局部社会压力如何塑造集体意见形成对现代社会至关重要，但现有研究多关注非空间网络（如随机、无标度、小世界网络），对空间邻近性驱动交互的网络中意见动力学机制尚缺乏深入理解。
AI.method: 采用Gabriel图作为空间嵌入网络，通过几何无序参数随机扰动代理坐标，实现从正方形格点到空间随机网络的过渡。引入非从众性参数，利用磁化率、磁化强度、Binder四阶累积量等统计物理工具分析意见动力学中的相变行为，并进行体积缩放分析临界指数。
AI.result: 模型表现出二阶相变，依赖几何无序和非从众性水平；关键临界指数与二维Ising普适类一致；空间约束的平面连通拓扑在临界动力学分析中保留了空间维度性。
AI.conclusion: 空间约束的、平面的、全局连通的交互拓扑在临界动力学分析中能保留空间的维度性，为理解空间网络上的社会共识形成提供了理论框架。

title: Interplay of non-local transport and local scattering during electron thermalization and spatial equilibration in laser-excited metals
summary: Ultrafast laser excitation of metals induces electronic nonequilibrium both in space and locally in the energy distribution. The subsequent dynamics are governed by the interplay between non-local transport and local scattering of hot electrons, yet combined microscopic descriptions of these processes remain sparse. Here, we disentangle the influence of these processes on thermalization using a reformulation of the Boltzmann transport equation in energy space that consistently describes both spatial equilibration and scattering through full collision integrals. Our results reveal that transport accelerates the apparent thermalization observed at the irradiated surface by removing athermal carriers, while the same spatial redistribution delays complete equilibration of the full electron system. We analyze the experimentally accessible energy-dependent dynamics at the front and back surface and find that the dominant process varies, depending on both position and on the energetic window. Overall, our work improves the understanding of the interplay of electronic nonequilibrium processes occurring in optically thick laser-driven systems with relevant implications for future electronic applications.

AI.tldr: 本文通过重构能量空间的玻尔兹曼输运方程，揭示了超快激光激发金属中非局域输运与局域散射对热化过程的竞争机制：输运加快表面表观热化但延迟系统整体平衡。
AI.motivation: 超快激光激发金属会产生空间和能量分布上的电子非平衡态，但目前缺乏同时描述非局域输运和局域散射的微观模型，难以厘清二者对热化过程的影响。
AI.method: 重新构建能量空间中的玻尔兹曼输运方程，通过完整的碰撞积分一致描述空间平衡化和散射过程，并分析前表面和后表面的能量依赖动力学。
AI.result: 输运通过移除非热载流子加速了辐照表面的表观热化，但同一空间再分布过程延迟了电子系统整体的完全平衡；前后表面的主导过程随位置和能量窗口而变化。
AI.conclusion: 该工作加深了对光厚激光驱动系统中电子非平衡过程相互作用的理解，对未来电子应用具有参考价值。

title: A differentiable machine learning small-angle X-ray scattering analysis framework for structure elucidation of lipid nanoparticles
summary: Lipid nanoparticles (LNPs) are efficient delivery systems for negatively charged nucleic acids. Their multi-component architecture yields a core-shell structure. Small-angle X-ray scattering (SAXS) is an important characterization technique for LNPs, but recovering internal structure and size distribution from SAXS is an inverse problem with non-unique solutions. Realistic models are often too expensive for systematic exploration. We introduce a machine-learning-accelerated, differentiable framework for SAXS analysis of heterogeneous, polydisperse LNPs. The forward model combines a core-shell particle with a Gaussian random-field interior, a neural surrogate for the monodisperse SAXS map, and a differentiable layer integrating over particle-size distributions. The surrogate reduces prediction cost by four orders of magnitude, while differentiability enables large-scale multi-start fitting and ensemble identifiability analysis. Applied to synthetic and experimental MC3 LNP data, the framework shows that near-identical SAXS fits can arise from distinct parameter modes, with the experimental fits dominated by a trade-off between size-distribution and interior-structure parameters.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种机器学习加速的可微框架，用于脂质纳米颗粒（LNP）的SAXS数据分析。该框架结合了核-壳模型、高斯随机场内部结构、神经网络代理（加速四个数量级）和可微尺寸分布积分层。通过合成和实验数据验证，发现相近的SAXS拟合可能来自不同的参数模式，且实验拟合由尺寸分布与内部结构参数之间的权衡主导。
AI.motivation: 脂质纳米颗粒（LNP）是负电荷核酸的高效递送系统，其核-壳结构对功能至关重要。SAXS是表征LNP的重要技术，但从中反演内部结构和尺寸分布是一个具有非唯一解的反问题。现有真实模型计算成本过高，难以进行系统探索。
AI.method: 提出一个机器学习加速的可微框架：1) 核-壳粒子与高斯随机场内部结构的前向模型；2) 神经网络代理替代单分散SAXS映射，降低预测成本四个数量级；3) 可微层实现尺寸分布积分；4) 利用可微性进行大规模多起点拟合并分析参数可辨识性。
AI.result: 在合成数据和实验MC3 LNP数据上验证表明：相近的SAXS拟合可以来自不同的参数模式；实验拟合主要由尺寸分布参数与内部结构参数之间的权衡主导。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过机器学习加速和可微性设计，有效解决了LNP的SAXS反问题中的非唯一性和计算成本问题，揭示了参数之间的耦合关系，为复杂纳米颗粒的表征提供了新方法。

title: A Comparative Study of Exponential Sum-Connectivity and Product-Connectivity Gourava Indices for Benzenoid Hydrocarbons
summary: In this work, the exponential sum-connectivity Gourava index ($e^{SGO(G)}$) and the exponential product-connectivity Gourava index ($e^{PGO(G)}$) are computed and comparatively analyzed for benzenoid hydrocarbons. Our results demonstrate that these descriptors exhibit a strong mutual correlation and provide enhanced sensitivity in modeling the structural characteristics of molecular graphs. Regression analysis reveals that both indices are exceptionally reliable predictors of $π$-electronic energies, achieving correlation coefficients exceeding $0.999$. Notably, a comparative assessment indicates that the exponential product-connectivity variant offers a slightly superior fit, as its coefficients align more precisely with optimal least-squares results. These findings confirm that both exponential Gourava-based indices provide a robust framework for characterizing electronic properties, with the product-connectivity version showing particular promise for high-precision QSPR studies in benzenoid systems.

AI.tldr: 本文计算并比较分析了苯环烃的指数和-连通Gourava指数(e^{SGO(G)})和指数积-连通Gourava指数(e^{PGO(G)})，发现两者都与π电子能量高度相关（相关系数>0.999），其中指数积-连通变体拟合效果略优。
AI.motivation: 旨在探索新型指数Gourava指数（SGO和PGO）的指数形式在苯环烃分子图结构表征中的有效性，为高精度QSPR（定量构性关系）研究提供新工具。
AI.method: 计算了苯环烃的e^{SGO(G)}和e^{PGO(G)}两个指数，通过回归分析评估它们与π电子能量的相关性，并对比两种指数在最小二乘拟合中的表现。
AI.result: 两个指数与π电子能量的相关系数均超过0.999，且彼此高度互相关。指数积-连通Gourava指数(e^{PGO(G)})的回归系数更接近最优最小二乘结果，拟合优度略高。
AI.conclusion: 两种指数Gourava指数均能稳健表征苯环烃的电子特性，其中指数积-连通变体在高精度QSPR研究中更具潜力。

title: A nanoscale magnetic spectrum analyzer based on qubit dressed states
summary: Magnetic field fluctuations on nanometer length scales manifest in a diverse range of phenomena -- electron and spin dynamics in materials and devices, quantum many-body systems, and molecular chemistry. Measuring these phenomena requires sensors with a challenging combination of broad spectral bandwidth, high sensitivity, and nanoscale spatial resolution. Nitrogen-vacancy (NV) centers, atom-like quantum sensors in diamond, possess the requisite sensitivity and nanoscale sensing volume, but are typically limited in bandwidth by the practical speed of the applied quantum control sequence. Here, we overcome this limitation by exposing the NV qubit to a microwave dressing field during a dynamical decoupling sequence, which both amplifies and frequency-mixes target signals at arbitrary frequencies into the detection band of the dynamical decoupling protocol. We demonstrate this approach by using NV centers to detect both coherent and noisy nanoscale spin wave dynamics in a magnetic yttrium-iron-garnet (YIG) thin film over a broad frequency range. Our technique generalizes to other qubit platforms, providing a versatile framework for nanoscale spectroscopy across diverse physical and chemical systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用微波 dressing 场增强 NV 色心量子传感器带宽的方法，实现了对纳米尺度自旋波动力学的宽带检测。
AI.motivation: 纳米尺度磁场涨落现象广泛存在，但现有 NV 色心传感器受限于量子控制序列的带宽，难以同时满足高灵敏度、宽频谱带宽和纳米级空间分辨率的要求。
AI.method: 在动态退耦序列中施加微波 dressing 场，该场既能放大目标信号，又能将任意频率的信号频率混频到动态退耦协议的检测带内，从而突破原有带宽限制。
AI.result: 利用 NV 色心成功检测了钇铁石榴石（YIG）薄膜中宽带（相干和非相干）纳米尺度自旋波动力学。
AI.conclusion: 该技术可推广至其他量子比特平台，为多种物理和化学系统中的纳米尺度光谱学提供通用框架。

title: Magnetochiral anisotropy in strained superconducting transition metal dichalcogenides
summary: We present a theoretical study of nonreciprocal charge transport in two-dimensional noncentrosymmetric superconductors, focusing on transition-metal dichalcogenide MoS$_2$ as a representative example. In the normal state, the electrical response of a material to the relative orientation of the current and magnetic field is suppressed to leading order in the symmetry-breaking perturbations. In the vicinity of the superconducting transition, magnetochiral anisotropy is strongly enhanced. We consider contributions to the nonreciprocal current originating from order-parameter fluctuations and quantum-interference processes. These terms are linked to higher-order Lifshitz invariants generically allowed in the Ginzburg-Landau free energy of superconductors with broken inversion and time-reversal symmetries. We further show that strain enables additional vector components in the nonlinear current response.

AI.tldr: 本文理论研究二维非中心对称超导体（以MoS₂为例）中的非互易电荷输运，发现超导转变附近磁手征各向异性显著增强，并分析了序参量涨落和量子干涉过程的贡献，同时揭示应变可引入非线性电流响应的额外矢量分量。
AI.motivation: 理解非中心对称超导体中非互易电荷输运的机理，特别是超导转变附近磁手征各向异性增强的物理根源。
AI.method: 基于Ginzburg-Landau自由能理论，考虑高阶Lifshitz不变量，分析序参量涨落和量子干涉过程对非互易电流的贡献，并研究应变效应。
AI.result: 超导转变附近磁手征各向异性显著增强；非互易电流来源于序参量涨落和量子干涉过程；应变可引入额外的非线性电流响应矢量分量。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了非中心对称超导体中非互易输运的增强机制及应变调控的可能性，为相关实验和器件设计提供了理论指导。

title: Understanding deconfined quantum critical points from crystalline categorical Landau paradigm
summary: Deconfined quantum critical points (DQCPs) involving lattice symmetries evade the conventional Landau paradigm because the competing orders break incompatible internal and crystalline symmetries. We show that a class of DQCPs can nevertheless be understood as Landau-type transitions after gauging anomalous onsite symmetries. For spin chains with Lieb-Schultz-Mattis (LSM) anomalies, gauging produces a noninvertible lattice translation whose fusion closes only up to ordinary translations, giving rise to a crystalline categorical symmetry. In the gauged description, the original DQCP becomes a transition between different symmetry breaking patterns of this categorical symmetry. We demonstrate this mechanism in microscopic lattice models; the magnetic-valence-bond-solid (VBS) DQCP realizes a Rep($D_8$)-type crystalline categorical Landau transition, whereas a y-antiferromagnetic-VBS DQCP realizes a Rep($H_8$)-type one. Although Rep($D_8$) and Rep($H_8$) share the same fusion rules, they have inequivalent $F$-symbols and therefore define distinct categorical descriptions. Our results show that the universal categorical structure underlying these DQCPs is encoded in the full fusion category, rather than in the fusion ring alone.

AI.tldr: 本文通过规范反常 onsite 对称性，将一类涉及晶格对称性的解禁量子临界点（DQCP）理解为 Landau 型相变，并在自旋链中通过非可逆晶格平移对称性实现了 Rep(D₈) 和 Rep(H₈) 两种类型的范畴 Landau 相变。
AI.motivation: DQCP 涉及不相容的内部与晶格对称性，无法用传统 Landau 范式描述；作者尝试通过规范反常对称性将其纳入 Landau 框架。
AI.method: 对具有 Lieb-Schultz-Mattis (LSM) 反常的自旋链进行规范操作，得到非可逆晶格平移对称性（结晶范畴对称性），并在微观格点模型中展示 DQCP 转变为该范畴对称性的不同对称性破缺模式之间的相变。
AI.result: 磁-VBS DQCP 实现 Rep(D₈) 型范畴 Landau 相变，y-反铁磁-VBS DQCP 实现 Rep(H₈) 型相变；两者融合规则相同但 F-符号不同，定义了不同的范畴描述。
AI.conclusion: DQCP 背后的普适范畴结构由完整的融合范畴（而非仅融合环）编码，表明范畴对称性为理解解禁量子临界点提供了新视角。

title: Dissipation-coherence tradeoff for stochastic oscillations
comment: 10 pages, 1 figure. Accepted in Phys. Rev. E
summary: Autonomous noisy oscillations in biochemical and mesoscopic systems require nonequilibrium driving and therefore dissipation. A striking conjecture by Oberreiter, Barato, and Seifert (OBS) proposes a universal lower bound on the entropy produced per oscillation period in terms of the coherence number of the slowest oscillatory mode. Here we derive a weaker but rigorous lower bound that preserves the OBS structure while introducing a mode-uniformity factor that quantifies how evenly the oscillatory eigenmode is distributed across states in the steady-state inner product. The result makes explicit that an eigenvalue-only prefactor can fail when the dominant oscillatory mode is localized. We also outline a proof-of-principle route for estimating this factor from low-dimensional data under single-mode dominance and sufficiently informative measurements, and derive an eigenvector-free corollary using only the smallest stationary probability. Translation-invariant Markov jump processes on a ring provide a symmetry-protected class with $η=1$, so the refinement reduces to the OBS form; the drift--diffusion limit on a circle saturates the bound.

AI.tldr: 本文针对OBS猜想（自发噪声振荡中熵产生与相干性的普适下界）进行了理论修正：推导了一个更弱但严格的下界，引入“模态均匀性因子”η，指出当主导振荡模态局域化时，仅依赖特征值的下界会失效。在平移不变环状马尔可夫跳过程中η=1，退化为OBS形式；圆上的漂移-扩散极限可紧确饱和该下界。
AI.motivation: OBS猜想提出了熵产生率与振荡相干性之间的普适下界，但该猜想尚缺严格证明。本文旨在揭示该猜想在何种条件下成立或失效，并给出可证的下界修正。
AI.method: 理论推导：通过引入稳态内积下的模态均匀性因子η（量化振荡特征模在状态上的分布均匀程度），推导了一个比OBS猜想更弱但严格的熵产生下界；并给出从低维数据估计η的路线图，以及仅依赖最小稳态概率的无特征向量推论。
AI.result: （1）证明了仅依赖特征值的OBS下界在主导模态局域化时可能失效；（2）建立了包含η因子的修正下界，该下界在平移不变环状跳过程中η=1，退化为OBS形式；（3）圆上漂移-扩散极限可饱和该下界。
AI.conclusion: 熵产生与相干性的下界需考虑特征模态的空间分布均匀性，而非仅依赖特征值。该工作为从实验数据估计该下界提供了理论工具，并指出了OBS猜想成立的对称保护条件。

title: Strong Optical-Optical Avoided Crossings Suppress Thermal Conductivity in Ga-Substituted TlInTe$_2$
summary: In crystalline solids, avoided crossing between acoustic and optical phonons is widely recognized as an effective mechanism for suppressing lattice thermal conductivity ($κ_l$). However, the role of avoided crossings among optical phonons remains largely unexplored due to their weak contribution to heat transport. Here, using first-principles calculations combined with the linearized Wigner transport equation (LWTE), we demonstrate that optical-optical avoided crossings can effectively reduce ($κ_l$) in TlIn$_{0.5}$Ga$_{0.5}$Te$_2$. Pristine TlInTe$_2$ exhibits strong optical phonon-dominated heat transport, where optical phonons contribute nearly 63% of $κ_l$. The phonon dispersion of TlInTe$_2$ shows several crossing points in the optical region, which evolve into avoided crossings after 50% Ga substitution. Irreducible representation analysis reveals that the crossing phonon branches in TlInTe$_2$ belong to different symmetry representations, whereas the corresponding branches in TlIn$_{0.5}$Ga$_{0.5}$Te$_2$ possess the same symmetry representation, which enables phonon modes to couple and results in gap opening at the crossing points. These avoided crossings significantly suppress the optical phonon group velocity, thereby reducing the optical phonon contribution from 63% to 44% and lowering $κ_l$ from 0.568 to 0.482 Wm$^{-1}$K$^{-1}$ at 300 K. Mode-averaged transport analysis further confirms that the suppression of $κ_l$ is primarily governed by reduced phonon group velocity ($v_g$), while enhanced anharmonic scattering provides an additional secondary contribution. Our results establish symmetry-modified optical-optical avoided crossing as an effective route to suppress optical phonon transport and reduce $κ_l$ in systems where optical phonons significantly contribute to heat transport.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算结合线性化Wigner输运方程，发现光学-光学声子间的避让交叉能有效降低TlIn₀.₅Ga₀.₅Te₂的晶格热导率，揭示了对称性修饰的避让交叉是抑制光学声子热输运的新机制。
AI.motivation: 已有研究关注声学-光学声子避让交叉对热导率的抑制，但光学-光学声子间的避让交叉因其对热输运贡献较弱而鲜有探索。本文旨在填补这一空白。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理计算结合线性化Wigner输运方程（LWTE），对TlInTe₂及Ga替代后的TlIn₀.₅Ga₀.₅Te₂进行声子谱分析和不可约表示对称性分析，计算热导率及各项输运参数。
AI.result: TlInTe₂中光学声子贡献63%的热导率。50% Ga替代后，光学分支在交叉点处因对称性相同而发生耦合，打开能隙，群速度显著降低，光学声子贡献降至44%，热导率从0.568降至0.482 W/m·K。抑制主要源于群速度降低，非谐散射增强为次要因素。
AI.conclusion: 对称性修饰的光学-光学声子避让交叉是有效抑制光学声子输运、降低晶格热导率的新途径，尤其适用于光学声子主导热输运的材料体系。

title: Multi-Fidelity Learning with Shallow Recurrent Decoders for Reactor Physics
summary: In reactor physics, neutronics can be treated with different fidelity levels, according to the needs of the user. On one hand, the precise modeling of neutrons' behaviour in reactor physics is often expensive and time-consuming due to the high computational costs to numerically solve the Boltzmann transport equation. Conversely, by adopting suitable assumptions, such as the SP$_N$, diffusion theory, and point kinetics, it is possible to generate efficiently low-fidelity data. From the perspective of surrogate models, this computational limitation translates into a scarcity of high-fidelity data and a significant amount of low-fidelity data. Given this difference in fidelity levels, it would be interesting to develop a suitable procedure to map low-fidelity models towards higher fidelity models; for instance, one could obtain the solution to a multi-group diffusion equation starting from time-series data obtained from a point kinetics model. Indeed, this work investigates this possibility by leveraging multi-fidelity information with Shallow Recurrent Decoders, a novel machine learning architecture able to map time-series observations to the full state of the reactor. This technique has been designed to use local or global measurements as input and map their temporal trajectories to the high-dimensional state; by the same logic, in principle, this architecture can also be used when the input is formed by the solution of a lumped model. This work applies this idea to a benchmark reactor geometry, mapping the point kinetics model to the diffusion solution under various input conditions, with much less computational costs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种利用浅层循环解码器（Shallow Recurrent Decoders）将低保真点动力学模型映射到高保真扩散方程解的多保真方法，在基准反应堆几何上验证了其以较低计算成本实现高精度预测的能力。
AI.motivation: 反应堆物理中，高保真中子学计算（求解玻尔兹曼输运方程）计算成本高昂，导致高保真数据稀缺；而低保真模型（如点动力学）虽然计算高效但精度不足。因此需要一种方法将低保真模型映射到高保真模型，在保证精度的同时降低计算开销。
AI.method: 提出一种基于浅层循环解码器（Shallow Recurrent Decoders）的多保真信息融合架构。该架构以时间序列观测（如点动力学模型的解）作为输入，通过循环神经网络结构将其映射到高维反应堆状态空间（扩散方程解），实现从低维集总参数模型到高维空间分布模型的转换。
AI.result: 在基准反应堆几何上的实验表明，该方法能够成功将点动力学模型映射到扩散方程解，在不同输入条件下以远低于高保真计算的成本获得准确结果。
AI.conclusion: 浅层循环解码器是一种有效的多保真建模工具，能够利用低保真时间序列数据重建高保真反应堆状态，为反应堆物理中计算效率与精度的权衡提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Quantum computing for accurate large-scale electronic-structure calculations: DFT-embedded, post-processed quantum-selected configuration interaction
summary: We present a multilevel embedding framework for quantum chemistry calculations on a quantum computer. In our framework, a quantum algorithm treats the strongly correlated active space, while a high-level wave-function method such as coupled cluster theory or multireference perturbation theory recovers the remaining correlation in the surrounding region. A sampling-based quantum algorithm, quantum-selected configuration interaction, bridges the quantum and classical treatments. The entire calculation is embedded in a low-cost density functional theory description of the surrounding environment using Manby's projection technique. We apply the framework to organic, metal-organic, and metallic systems, computing bond dissociation energies, adsorption energies, and reaction barriers using only the subset of qubits of a 144-qubit superconducting quantum computer at the University of Osaka and achieving $\sim$1 kcal/mol agreement with classical references for a Menshutkin $\mathrm{S_N2}$ reaction inside a carbon nanotube. Our results may open the way to quantitatively reliable quantum-classical hybrid calculations for large-scale chemical systems.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个多层级量子计算嵌入框架，将量子算法处理强关联活性空间、经典波函数方法（如耦合簇）处理周围区域、量子选择组态相互作用桥接两者，并通过投影技术嵌入低成本的密度泛函理论环境描述。在144量子比特超导量子计算机上验证了有机、金属有机及金属体系，键解离能、吸附能和反应势垒的计算与经典参考值误差约1 kcal/mol，展示了大规模化学体系定量可靠的量子-经典混合计算前景。
AI.motivation: 当前量子化学计算面临精度与效率的矛盾：经典方法（如DFT、CC）在处理强关联体系时成本过高或精度不足，而量子计算机虽能处理强关联活性空间，但受限于量子比特数量和噪声，无法直接计算整个大体系。因此需要一种框架，将量子与经典方法有机结合，实现大规模化学体系的高精度计算。
AI.method: 构建多层级嵌入框架：(1) 强关联活性空间用量子算法处理；(2) 周围区域用高精度经典波函数方法（如耦合簇理论或多参考微扰理论）恢复相关能；(3) 量子与经典部分通过量子选择组态相互作用（QSCI）采样算法桥接；(4) 整个体系嵌入由Manby投影技术描述的低成本DFT环境。
AI.result: 在144量子比特超导量子计算机上测试了有机、金属有机及金属体系，计算了键解离能、吸附能和反应势垒。对于碳纳米管内Menshutkin SN2反应，结果与经典参考值的误差约1 kcal/mol。
AI.conclusion: 该多层级嵌入框架能够实现大规模化学体系定量可靠的量子-经典混合计算，为未来在含噪中等规模量子设备上进行实用化量子化学模拟开辟了道路。

title: Realistic quantum device data synthesized by consumer AI and how to identify it
summary: With the advance of generative artificial intelligence (AI) synthetic texts and images have become commonplace. These capabilities offer clear benefits, but have also raised a number of ethical concerns that often have to do with misrepresenting AI outputs as genuine material. A lesser known capability of generative AI is to perform the basic analysis, processing and even synthesis of numerical data. This raises the question of whether AI can be used to imitate experimental data that an expert would consider scientifically meaningful and on par with data in the figures of peer-reviewed manuscripts? In this paper, we focus on synthesizing data inspired by well-known experiments done frequently on quantum electronic devices. This field is related to information technologies such as spintronics and quantum computing, and is considered data-rich and data-driven. We demonstrate that it is possible to generate dramatic signals associated with iconic effects such as quantum bit control, Majorana fermions, Josephson effects, quantum dots and wires using widely available ChatGPT. We find that because some of the clearest data from quantum devices can be expressed in terms of relatively basic mathematical models, AI does not need to learn on the specialized body of data. Instead, knowledge of the physics equations and of the basic features of experimental signals can go a long way towards building a realistic dataset. We also demonstrate that real data can be augmented by AI, and that AI can mimic the noise of common scientific instruments. To help assure that published data come from experiments and are not synthesized by AI, we recommend sharing large volumes of the primary data. While it is straightforward for AI to mimic a few sets of data, consistently generating long measured sequences poses sufficient barriers to the proliferation of undisclosed synthetic data.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了使用ChatGPT等生成式AI可以合成量子电子器件实验数据，生成量子比特控制、马约拉纳费米子、约瑟夫森效应等标志性信号，并提出通过共享大量原始数据来防范AI合成数据被误用作真实实验结果。
AI.motivation: 生成式AI已能生成文本和图像，引发伦理担忧。作者想探究AI是否也能合成数值实验数据，使其达到与同行评审论文中数据相当的科学可信度，从而可能被用于不当学术行为。
AI.method: 使用广泛可用的ChatGPT，基于量子电子器件中常见实验的物理方程和基本信号特征，生成量子比特控制、马约拉纳费米子、约瑟夫森效应、量子点和量子线等标志性效应的合成数据，并模拟实验噪声。
AI.result: 成功生成了与真实实验数据高度相似的合成数据；AI不需要专业实验数据训练，仅依靠物理方程和信号特征即可构建逼真数据集；AI还能增强真实数据并模拟科学仪器噪声。
AI.conclusion: 为防范AI合成数据被误用作真实实验结果，建议共享大量原始数据。虽然AI可轻松模仿少量数据集，但持续生成长测量序列存在足够障碍，可限制未公开合成数据的泛滥。

title: Fermiology and the Candidate Chiral Superconductor in Rhombohedral Tetralayer Graphene
summary: Chiral superconductivity, in which the phase of the superconducting order parameter winds in momentum space, has long been sought for its close link to topological superconductivity. Recent work reported a superconductor in rhombohedral multilayer graphene emerging from a time-reversal symmetry broken normal state, suggesting that it could be a chiral superconductor. However, the possibility of chirality depends on the symmetry and structure of the normal-state Fermi surface, which have not been directly measured. Here we measure quantum oscillations in rhombohedral tetralayer graphene over a broad range of the phase diagram, including the superconducting region. At densities well above the onset of superconductivity, we reproduce previously-reported oscillations consistent with a spin- and valley-polarized quarter metal with a single simply-connected Fermi pocket. As the carrier density is reduced, we find a transition to a complex "multitone" state that persists through the superconducting region. This state's spectrum of quantum oscillations is incompatible with a simply-connected quarter metal. The next-simplest candidate normal states suggested by our microscopic modeling (fully-polarized annular, nematic, and three-pocket states) are inconsistent with our measurements, albeit difficult to rule out entirely. The normal state is thus seen to be richer than previously envisaged, reshaping the search for the superconducting mechanism and the possible chirality of the pairing channel.

AI.tldr: 本文通过量子振荡测量发现，菱方四层石墨烯的超导正常态并非简单的自旋/谷极化四分之一金属，而是一种更复杂的“多频”态，挑战了手性超导体的可能性。
AI.motivation: 寻找手性超导（序参量在动量空间具有缠绕相位）及其与拓扑超导的关联，近期菱方多层石墨烯中发现源自时间反演对称性破缺正常态的超导，暗示可能为手性超导，但正常态费米面的对称性和结构尚未被直接测量。
AI.method: 在菱方四层石墨烯的宽相图范围内（包括超导区域）测量量子振荡，并结合微观建模对比不同正常态候选（全极化环形态、向列态、三口袋态）的振荡频谱。
AI.result: 在高密度区复现了与自旋/谷极化四分之一金属一致的单一费米口袋振荡；在低密度区发现了一个贯穿超导区域的复杂“多频”态，其频谱与简单四分之一金属不符，也与全极化环形、向列、三口袋等候选态不一致。
AI.conclusion: 正常态比先前设想的更丰富，这一发现重塑了对超导机制和配对通道可能手性的探索方向。

title: Symmetry-Selective Stabilization of Charge-Density Wave in ScV$_6$Sn$_6$
summary: Charge-density-wave (CDW) order in kagome metals is highly sensitive to external tuning parameters such as chemical substitution and hydrostatic pressure, which generally suppress long-range order. Here, using high-resolution X-ray diffraction under controlled uniaxial strain, we show that anisotropic lattice deformation instead stabilizes and enhances the CDW state in ScV$_6$Sn$_6$. Compression along the [H00] and [HH0] directions lowers the crystal symmetry from hexagonal to orthorhombic, lifts the degeneracy between symmetry-equivalent in-plane CDW domains, and promotes long-range order while preserving the underlying trimer instability. Phonon calculations indicate only a moderate stabilization of the imaginary flat phonon mode, demonstrating that the increase in T$_\mathrm{CDW}$ is primarily driven by the in-plane ordering of the Sn$^\mathrm{T}$--Sc--Sn$^\mathrm{T}$ \textit{rattling} chains within the frustrated kagome lattice. A phenomenological model incorporating strain-dependent Ising couplings within a three-state Potts framework successfully reproduces the evolution of T$_\mathrm{CDW}$ under compression and captures the continuous nature of the transition. Our results establish uniaxial strain as a powerful symmetry-selective tuning parameter for order-disorder transformations in frustrated lattices.

AI.tldr: 本文通过在ScV₆Sn₆ kagome金属上施加单轴应变，发现各向异性晶格变形能够稳定并增强电荷密度波（CDW）态，压缩沿[H00]和[HH0]方向会降低晶体对称性，提升CDW转变温度，并揭示了应变通过调控面内Snᵀ-Sc-Snᵀ“rattling”链的Ising耦合来促进有序化的机制。
AI.motivation: Kagome金属中的CDW序对外部调控参数（如化学替代、静水压）敏感，但这些手段通常抑制长程有序。作者想探索各向异性单轴应变作为一种对称性选择的调控手段，是否能够稳定而非抑制CDW态，并揭示其物理机制。
AI.method: 采用高分辨X射线衍射在受控单轴应变下研究ScV₆Sn₆，结合声子计算和基于三态Potts模型的唯象模型，分析应变对CDW序的影响。
AI.result: 单轴压缩沿[H00]和[HH0]方向将晶体对称性从六方降至正交，解除面内CDW域简并，促进长程有序，提升T_CDW；声子计算显示虚频平带仅中等程度稳定，T_CDW增加主要由面内Snᵀ-Sc-Snᵀ链的有序化驱动；Potts模型成功再现了T_CDW的应变演化。
AI.conclusion: 单轴应变是一种高效的对称性选择调控参数，可用于调控受阻晶格中的有序-无序转变，为研究kagome金属中CDW的竞争序提供了新途径。

title: Polylogarithmic Structure of Bragg Diffraction in Finite-Coherence Lattices
summary: We develop a polylogarithmic structure for Bragg diffraction based on a weighted multi-plane interference model. Within this kind of construction, the scattering amplitude is expressed as a polylogarithmic generating function. By introducing extra contributions with power-law and the usual exponential decay, it takes the form $F(θ) = \mathrm{Li}_m\left(e^{iθ_{\mathrm{eff}} - ε}\right)$, where $ε$ is a finite coherence length. In the limit where $ε\rightarrow 0$, the argument of the polylogarithm approaches the unit circle and the classical Bragg condition corresponds to the approach of the polylogarithm argument toward its branch point $z=1$. This formulation provides a compact analytical framework for describing diffraction line shapes within a generalized correlation model in which peak positions, widths, and line shapes arise from a single analytic structure. Although we are able to recover the standard Bragg law for ideal crystals, the polylogarithm model captures deviations due to finite correlation length, disorder and non-uniform lattice coherence. We show that if Bragg peaks correspond to boundary singularities of the polylogarithm, a connection between diffraction theory and complex analysis arise. The proposed theoretical model may be particularly relevant for disordered or partially coherent materials, where conventional diffraction models often require additional phenomenological broadening assumptions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于加权多平面干涉模型的布拉格衍射多对数结构，将散射振幅表示为多对数生成函数，为衍射峰形状提供了紧凑的分析框架。
AI.motivation: 传统衍射模型在处理无序或部分相干材料时，需要额外引入唯象的展宽假设，缺乏统一的解析框架来同时描述峰位、峰宽和线形。
AI.method: 基于加权多平面干涉模型，在散射振幅中引入幂律和指数衰减贡献，将其表达为多对数生成函数形式 $F(θ) = \mathrm{Li}_m\left(e^{iθ_{\mathrm{eff}} - ε}\right)$，其中ε为有限相干长度。
AI.result: 在ε→0极限下，多对数自变量逼近单位圆，经典布拉格条件对应于自变量趋近分支点z=1。该模型能恢复理想晶体的标准布拉格定律，同时捕捉有限相干长度、无序和非均匀晶格相干性导致的偏差。
AI.conclusion: 该模型建立了衍射峰与多对数边界奇点之间的联系，揭示了衍射理论与复分析之间的深层关联，特别适用于无序或部分相干材料。

title: The KNN rollercoaster: from bulk ceramics to phase engineered wafer-scale thin films
summary: Since the initial disclosure of the extraordinary piezoelectric coefficients of Potassium sodium niobate (KNN) in near-equimolar bulk ceramics, its development trajectory has resembled a rollercoaster, with its integration into microelectronics severely lagging due to thermodynamic stability issues and poor planar process compatibility. In this work, we revisit the bulk-derived phase diagram for the specific case of thin films integrated on silicon. By systematically investigating Mn-doped K1-xNaxNbO3 films grown on 8-inch wafers, we demonstrate that the optimal stoichiometry for thin films fundamentally diverges from the bulk equimolar standard. A Na-rich composition (> 70 at.%) is required to overcome substrate-induced constraints, effectively suppressing pyrochlore formation and chemical phase segregation while promoting dense columnar growth with a complete (001) out-of-plane polar orientation. Consequently, Na-rich films deliver outstanding functional properties, reaching remanent polarizations up to 14 uC cm-2, with piezoelectric coefficients of d33f= 79 pm/V and e31f = 10 C/m2. Supported by Density Functional Theory simulations, we correlate this enhancement with improved stability and a strain-driven structural reorientation toward a lower-symmetry monoclinic phase with tilted polarization. By redefining the phase engineering rules for wafer-scale thin films, our results establish a clear route toward KNN integration in microsystems.

AI.tldr: 本文发现KNN薄膜在硅基集成时，最佳组分并非传统的等摩尔比，而是富Na（>70 at.%）组分。富Na薄膜能有效抑制焦绿石相和化学偏析，实现（001）取向柱状生长，压电系数d33f达79 pm/V，为KNN在微系统中的应用开辟了新路径。
AI.motivation: KNN因其优异的压电系数在块体陶瓷中备受关注，但由于热力学稳定性差和平面工艺不兼容，其在微电子中的集成严重滞后。本文旨在解决KNN薄膜在硅基集成中的相稳定性与工艺兼容性问题。
AI.method: 系统研究Mn掺杂K1-xNaxNbO3薄膜在8英寸晶圆上的生长，结合DFT模拟，重新审视块体相图在薄膜场景下的适用性，探索最佳化学计量比。
AI.result: 富Na组分（>70 at.%）能克服衬底约束，抑制焦绿石相和化学偏析，促进（001）取向柱状生长。剩余极化达14 μC/cm²，压电系数d33f=79 pm/V，e31f=10 C/m²。
AI.conclusion: 重新定义了晶圆级KNN薄膜的相工程规则，证明富Na组分是实现高性能压电薄膜的关键，为KNN在微系统中的实用化提供了明确路径。

title: Newton's Identity in Finite-Bead Fermionic Partition Function
summary: For non-interacting fermions in a harmonic trap, the partition function at any discrete number of imaginary time slices (or beads) and for any choice of short-time propagator admits an exact recursion relation derived directly from the contracted determinant form of the path integral. This finite-bead recursion is distinct from earlier continuum-limit recursions, which do not apply to the discrete time partition functions. By identifying a direct correspondence between this recursion and Newton's identity, application of a closed-form result from the theory of partitions provides an exact expression for the one-dimensional $n$-fermion finite-bead partition function. From this, the Thermodynamic and Hamiltonian energies and specific heats are analytically calculated for any $n$, $N$, $τ$, and propagator choice.

AI.tldr: 本文针对谐振子势中非相互作用费米子的路径积分，推导出有限虚时切片数下配分函数的精确递推关系，并通过与牛顿恒等式的对应，得到一维n费米子有限切片配分函数的闭式表达式，进而解析计算了热力学与哈密顿能量及比热。
AI.motivation: 现有连续极限递推关系不适用于离散时间配分函数，需要建立适用于任意切片数和短时传播子选择的精确递推方法。
AI.method: 从约化行列式形式的路径积分出发，推导出有限虚时切片配分函数的精确递推关系；通过将该递推与牛顿恒等式对应，利用分拆理论的闭式结果得到一维n费米子有限切片配分函数的解析表达式。
AI.result: 获得了任意粒子数n、切片数N、虚时τ和传播子选择下一维费米子配分函数的精确解析解，并据此解析计算了热力学能与哈密顿能及比热。
AI.conclusion: 该工作填补了离散时间路径积分中递推关系的空白，为有限切片量子蒙特卡洛模拟提供了精确基准，并为分析不同短时传播子近似的影响提供了理论工具。

title: Majorana-like fermion physics: Emergence of topologically protected vortical states in graphene interacting with an electromagnetic field
summary: Within the framework of a quasi-relativistic model of graphene that admits topologically nontrivial Majorana-like quasiparticle excitations, appearance of such vortex states in the frequency dependencies of the complex dielectric permittivity of the system subjected to an external electromagnetic field has been examined. The vortex graphene states possess topological charges (flavours ) being nonzero Zak phases. Interaction effects of Majorana-like modes have been qualitatively related to the formation of Fano resonances in the optical response. The constructed topological model of graphene may be considered as a toy model of three-flavour mass-neutrino oscillations.

AI.tldr: 本文在准相对论性石墨烯模型中研究了一种类似马约拉纳准粒子激发的手征涡旋态，揭示了这些拓扑非平庸态对石墨烯介电常数频散关系的影响，并将其与三味中微子质量振荡进行了类比。
AI.motivation: 探索石墨烯中可能存在的拓扑非平庸马约拉纳型准粒子激发，并研究这些涡旋态在外加电磁场下对光学响应（特别是复杂介电常数）的影响。
AI.method: 采用准相对论性石墨烯模型，该模型允许拓扑非平庸的马约拉纳型准粒子激发；通过分析系统在外加电磁场中复杂介电常数的频率依赖性，研究涡旋态的出现；利用Zak相位表征拓扑荷（味），并将马约拉纳模式的相互作用与Fano共振的形成定性联系起来。
AI.result: 发现石墨烯中存在带拓扑荷（非零Zak相位）的涡旋态，这些态在介电常数的频散关系中表现出特征性信号，且马约拉纳模式的相互作用可诱导光学响应中的Fano共振。
AI.conclusion: 所构建的拓扑石墨烯模型可作为三味中微子质量振荡的玩具模型，揭示了凝聚态物理与高能物理中拓扑激发现象的深层联系。

title: BCS-BEC crossover driven by small Fermi pockets of a high-Tc cuprate superconductor
summary: Fermi arcs observed in underdoped cuprates have sparked debate over whether they represent segments of a large Fermi surface or small Fermi pockets. This ambiguity has long hindered their classification as either the conventional Bardeen-Cooper-Schrieffer (BCS) regime or the strongly coupled Bose-Einstein condensation (BEC) crossover limit. Here, using angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy and quantum oscillations, we demonstrate the coexistence of a small Fermi pocket and a large superconducting gap in the clean inner CuO2 layers of the four-layer cuprate Ba2Ca3Cu4O8(F,O)2. This coexistence constitutes a hallmark of the BCS-BEC crossover and has remained elusive for decades. Despite the presence of antiferromagnetic (AF) order, the superconducting gap in the small pocket is remarkably large, yielding a gap-to-Fermi-energy ratio (Delta_pocket/e_F ~ 0.6) and a critical-to-Fermi-temperature ratio (Tc/TF ~ 1.3) that reach the theoretical upper bound for two-dimensional superconductivity. Unexpectedly, this BCS-BEC crossover emerges not as the carrier density decreases but as it increases, abruptly within a narrow doping range of less than 1%. These results provide a long-sought microscopic foundation for the d-wave pairing mechanism in doped AF-Mott insulators.

AI.tldr: 本文通过ARPES和量子振荡实验，在四层铜酸盐超导体中发现小费米口袋与大超导能隙共存，证实了BCS-BEC交叉的存在。该交叉出现在掺杂增加时，且发生在极窄的1%掺杂范围内，为d波配对机制提供了微观基础。
AI.motivation: 解决欠掺杂铜氧化物中费米弧究竟是大型费米面的片段还是小型费米口袋的长期争议，并澄清其属于BCS regime还是BEC crossover limit的分类问题。
AI.method: 使用角分辨光电子能谱（ARPES）和量子振荡（quantum oscillations）技术，对四层铜酸盐Ba2Ca3Cu4O8(F,O)2中干净的内部CuO2层进行测量。
AI.result: 发现小费米口袋与大超导能隙共存，能隙与费米能之比Δ_pocket/ε_F ≈ 0.6，临界温度与费米温度之比Tc/TF ≈ 1.3，达到二维超导理论上限。该BCS-BEC交叉出现在掺杂增加时，且在不到1%的极窄掺杂范围内突然发生。
AI.conclusion: 为掺杂反铁磁Mott绝缘体中的d波配对机制提供了长期寻求的微观基础，确认了BCS-BEC crossover的存在。

title: A microscopic design rule for spin supersolids in triangular-lattice magnets
summary: Spin supersolids emerge as a central topic in frustrated magnetism, motivating the search for realization in quantum materials. To this end, we study the origin of exchange anisotropy, $Δ$, in triangular-lattice cobaltate families $X_2$$Y$Co(PO$_4$)$_2$ and $X_2$Co(SeO$_3$)$_2$ ($X$ = Na, K, Rb, Cs; $Y$ = Mg, Ca, Sr, Ba) by tailoring realistic spin models. We show that $Δ$ is determined by the ratio of trigonal crystal field to spin-orbit coupling strength. This framework explains contrasting anisotropies in these families, predicts systematic trends in $Δ$ across $X/Y$-substitutions, and identifies candidate materials for spin supersolids. Our results establish trigonal field engineering as a microscopic route toward the design of spin supersolids.

AI.tldr: 通过调控三角形晶格钴酸盐家族中的三角晶场与自旋轨道耦合强度比，实现交换各向异性Δ的工程化，为设计自旋超固体材料提供微观路径。
AI.motivation: 自旋超固体是阻挫磁学中的核心课题，但缺乏在真实量子材料中实现的指导原则，亟需理解交换各向异性的微观起源以指导材料设计。
AI.method: 基于真实自旋模型，系统研究三角晶场与自旋轨道耦合强度之比如何决定交换各向异性Δ，并在两类钴酸盐家族（磷酸盐和亚硒酸盐）中通过X/Y元素替换进行系统验证。
AI.result: Δ由三角晶场与自旋轨道耦合的强度比决定；该框架成功解释并预测了不同家族及元素替换下的各向异性变化趋势，筛选出候选自旋超固体材料。
AI.conclusion: 三角晶场工程可作为设计自旋超固体的微观调控手段，为阻挫磁体中的量子物态实现提供新路径。

title: A granular Büttiker-Landauer motor
summary: Random walkers usually diffuse according to Fick's law. On average, they move down the gradient of their concentration and, in the absence of external force, tend to distribute themselves uniformly. In some experiments, however, this familiar notion is at odds with observation. Sand grains, for instance, gather along the nodal lines of a vibrated elastic plate to form a Chladni figure, thus accumulating where fluctuations are weak -- a fact that escapes the reach of Fick's law. On theoretical grounds, Büttiker [Zeitschrift für Physik B, 68, 1987] and Landauer [J Stat Phys, 53, 1988] proposed that particles submitted to a non-uniform temperature field would indeed gather where the temperature is low. They also predicted that, in the presence of a potential force, a non-uniform temperature could drive a steady current of particles, powered only by noise. Here, we present an experimental realization of these phenomena in a macroscopic system, which confirms the quantitative predictions of Büttiker.

AI.tldr: 本文通过宏观实验验证了Büttiker和Landauer的理论预测：在非均匀温度场中，粒子会聚集在低温区域，且非均匀温度能在有势力存在时产生仅由噪声驱动的稳态粒子流。这一现象偏离了经典的菲克扩散定律，如在Chladni图形中观察到的沙粒聚集行为。
AI.motivation: 经典菲克定律无法解释某些实验中粒子在波动弱处聚集的现象（如Chladni图形），Büttiker和Landauer从理论上提出了非均匀温度场下粒子会向低温区聚集的预测，本文旨在通过宏观实验验证这些理论预测。
AI.method: 设计宏观实验系统，在非均匀温度场中观察粒子的运动行为，同时引入势能力，测量稳态粒子流，对Büttiker的理论预测进行定量验证。
AI.result: 实验成功观察到了粒子在低温区域聚集的现象，并在势能力存在下检测到了由噪声驱动的稳态粒子流，定量结果与Büttiker的理论预测一致。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过宏观实验首次实证了非均匀温度场中粒子的反常聚集行为及噪声驱动的稳态流，确认了Büttiker理论的正确性，揭示了菲克定律之外的新的扩散机制。

title: Resolving room temperature microscale fracture and plasticity of iron oxides along the cascade of iron ore reduction via nanoindentation and microcantilever bending
summary: Understanding the fundamental mechanical behaviour of iron oxide phases is essential for controlling attrition and fracture during iron ore reduction process, particularly in hydrogen-based direct reduction systems. This study investigates the room temperature plasticity and fracture behaviour of single-crystal hematite, magnetite, and Wustite using nanoindentation and micro-cantilever fracture testing. Hematite exhibited the highest hardness, H and elastic modulus, E (H=18.5 GPa, E=281 GPa), followed by magnetite (H=8.7 GPa, E=165 GPa) and Wustite (H=7.5 GPa, E=145 GPa), reflecting differences in slip activity along the iron oxide reduction sequence. Furthermore, fracture toughness was measured using notched microcantilevers for all three iron oxide phases, aligned along low index and high index crystallographic planes, respectively. For the low index-oriented case hematite showed increased fracture toughness owing to crack deviation and faceting while magnetite and Wustite exhibited single plane cleavage fracture. Distinct changes in the deformation behavior in terms of plasticity and cracking of the three iron oxides were evident from both methods. Further investigation of a magnetite-gangue interface, particularly relevant to low-concentration ores, revealed significantly reduced fracture toughness compared to the magnetite phase. Overall, these results provide a comprehensive set of mechanical properties of iron oxides with potential application in material models for predicting fracture and attrition during hydrogen-based direct reduction.

AI.tldr: 本文通过纳米压痕和微悬臂梁断裂测试，系统研究了赤铁矿、磁铁矿和方铁矿三种铁氧化物相在室温下的塑性和断裂行为，获得了硬度、弹性模量和断裂韧性等力学性能参数，并发现磁铁矿-脉石界面的断裂韧性显著降低，为氢基直接还原过程中的断裂和磨损预测提供了材料模型基础。
AI.motivation: 理解铁氧化物相的基本力学行为对于控制铁矿石还原过程中的磨损和断裂至关重要，特别是在氢基直接还原系统中，但目前缺乏对三种主要铁氧化物相（赤铁矿、磁铁矿、方铁矿）力学性能的系统对比研究。
AI.method: 采用纳米压痕测试硬度(H)和弹性模量(E)，利用带缺口的微悬臂梁测试断裂韧性，分别沿低指数和高指数晶面方向进行测试，并进一步研究了磁铁矿-脉石界面的断裂行为。
AI.result: 赤铁矿的硬度和弹性模量最高（H=18.5 GPa, E=281 GPa），磁铁矿次之（H=8.7 GPa, E=165 GPa），方铁矿最低（H=7.5 GPa, E=145 GPa）。低指数取向的赤铁矿因裂纹偏转和分面表现出更高的断裂韧性，而磁铁矿和方铁矿呈现单面解理断裂。磁铁矿-脉石界面的断裂韧性显著低于纯磁铁矿相。
AI.conclusion: 研究系统提供了三种铁氧化物相的力学性能数据，可用于氢基直接还原过程中断裂和磨损预测的材料模型，其中界面力学行为对低品位矿石的处理具有重要工程意义。

title: Towards stable and accurate electron dynamics via neural network based time-dependent variational Monte Carlo
summary: Real-time dynamics of interacting electrons lies at the interface between quantum mechanics and non-equilibrium physics, governing the microscopic origin of ultrafast phenomena of molecules and nano-materials. Though neural network variational Monte Carlo has achieved unprecedented accuracy for stationary state calculations, its extension to real-time evolution remains challenging. In this work, we introduce the neural basis time-dependent variational Monte Carlo framework, which achieves stable and highly accurate simulations of electron dynamics. By constraining the time evolution to a compact, customized manifold spanned by the neural basis, we effectively bypass instability issues and achieve long-term stable evolution. Moreover, we demonstrate that this framework yields benchmark-quality accuracy in simulating the laser-driven dipole responses of the hydrogen atom and a stretched hydrogen molecule, and accurately extracts the dynamic polarizabilities of helium and beryllium atoms. Our work reveals the vast potential of neural network wavefunctions for accurately describing real-time electron dynamics and establishes a promising new route for first-principles simulations of complex, time-dependent electronic phenomena.

AI.tldr: 本文提出神经基时变蒙特卡洛框架，通过将时间演化约束在神经基张成的紧致流形上，实现了稳定且高精度的电子实时动力学模拟，在氢原子、拉伸氢分子、氦和铍原子的激光驱动响应和动态极化率计算中取得了基准级精度。
AI.motivation: 虽然神经网络变分蒙特卡洛在稳态计算中取得了前所未有的精度，但其扩展到实时时间演化仍然存在挑战（不稳定等问题）。
AI.method: 提出神经基时变蒙特卡洛框架，通过将时间演化约束在由神经基张成的紧致、定制化流形上，有效规避了不稳定性问题，实现长期稳定演化。
AI.result: 在氢原子和拉伸氢分子的激光驱动偶极响应模拟中达到基准级精度，并准确提取了氦和铍原子的动态极化率。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了神经网络波函数在准确描述实时电子动力学方面的巨大潜力，为复杂时变电子现象的第一性原理模拟开辟了新路径。

title: Breakdown of Fluctuational Electrodynamics in the Extreme Near Field
summary: Fluctuational electrodynamics relies on the assumption that thermal fluctuations in distinct bodies are statistically independent. We show that this approximation breaks down in the extreme near-field regime, where overlapping evanescent surface fields hybridize optical phonons across nanometric vacuum gaps and generate fluctuating-current cross correlations between opposite interfaces. Using a microscopic coupled-oscillator model combined with a Green-tensor formulation of the Poynting vector, we derive the resulting correlation-induced correction to the radiative heat flux. For polar materials supporting surface phonon-polaritons, these correlations become significant when the hybridization energy is comparable to the intrinsic damping rate and can substantially modify conventional fluctuational-electrodynamics predictions at subnanometric separations. Our results establish a microscopic framework for correlated thermal fluctuations in the extreme near-field regime and quantify their impact on radiative heat transfer.

AI.tldr: 该论文指出极端近场区域中不同物体的热涨落并非统计独立，当表面声子极化激元在亚纳米间隙中杂化时，涨落电流会产生交叉关联，并基于耦合振子模型和格林张量方法推导出对辐射热通量的修正，量化了传统涨落电动力学在亚纳米间距下的偏差。
AI.motivation: 挑战涨落电动力学中"不同物体热涨落统计独立"的核心假设，探究极端近场下该假设的失效条件及其对辐射传热的影响。
AI.method: 采用微观耦合振子模型，结合坡印廷矢量的格林张量表述，推导涨落电流交叉关联引起的辐射热通量修正项。
AI.result: 发现对于支持表面声子极化激元的极性材料，当杂化能与固有阻尼率相当时关联效应显著，在亚纳米间距下会大幅改变传统涨落电动力学的预测结果。
AI.conclusion: 建立了极端近场区域关联热涨落的微观框架，定量揭示了亚纳米间距下传统理论需修正的物理条件与幅度。

title: Strongly nonlinear regime of Josephson transmission lines revealed by two-tone spectroscopy
summary: We present experimental and theoretical studies of the off-resonant and strongly nonlinear regime of Josephson transmission lines (JTLs) with galvanically-coupled nonlinear elements. The transition from the weakly to the strongly nonlinear regime of a JTL induced by increasing the input power of the pump is probed via two-tone spectroscopy. Measurements of the phase of the transmission coefficient for a weak probe signal reveal a large increase and pronounced oscillations in the phase length variation as a function of the microwave power of the pump. Experimental observations are explained on the basis of the developed theoretical approach suitable for the description of the nonlinear response of strongly driven JTLs. Using the derived nonlinear wave equation, we show that the behavior of the phase length variation is associated with the oscillatory dependence of the Josephson inductances on the microwave power. It is demonstrated that the dissipation-induced propagation losses increase in the strongly nonlinear regime and also lead to smearing out the phase length oscillations. The developed theoretical analysis is in good agreement with experimental observations.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验和理论研究，探索了约瑟夫森传输线在强非线性区（离共振条件下）的相位长度振荡行为，并建立了与微波功率相关的理论模型，实验结果与理论分析吻合良好。
AI.motivation: 研究约瑟夫森传输线从弱非线性到强非线性区的过渡机制，揭示强驱动下相位长度随微波功率振荡的物理根源。
AI.method: 采用双音谱学探测不同泵浦功率下的弱探针信号传输系数相位变化；推导非线性波动方程描述强驱动JTL的非线性响应。
AI.result: 发现相位长度变化随微波功率出现大幅增加和显著振荡；证明振荡源于约瑟夫森电感对微波功率的依赖关系；耗散引起的传播损耗在强非线性区增大并抹平相位振荡。
AI.conclusion: 所发展的理论框架能准确描述强驱动JTL的非线性行为，理论预测与实验观测高度一致。

title: Unveiling orbital landscapes in strongly correlated bulk nickelates with $s$-NIXS
summary: We leverage $s$-orbital non-resonant inelastic X-ray scattering ($s$-NIXS) to perform orbital imaging on three bulk rare-earth nickelates spanning a range of formal nickel valence (3$d$ electron filling) from Ni$^{3+}$ (3$d^7$) to Ni$^{1+}$ (3$d^9$). Our results directly reveal the ground states of these compounds all with minimal theoretical input. In particular, we demonstrate the low-spin orbital configuration of trivalent LaNiO$_3$, the $d_{x^2-y^2}$ configuration of monovalent LaNiO$_2$, and resolve the effective $e_g$ crystal field splitting in the distorted octahedral environment of divalent La$_2$NiO$_4$. This work illustrates the potential of $s$-NIXS to study the ground state and excited states of strongly correlated materials without needing complex theoretical analysis of spectroscopic data.

AI.tldr: 本研究利用s轨道非共振非弹性X射线散射技术，对三种稀土镍酸盐（Ni价态从Ni³⁺到Ni¹⁺）进行轨道成像，直接揭示了其基态轨道构型，无需复杂理论分析。
AI.motivation: 传统光谱方法需要复杂的理论分析才能解释强关联材料的基态和激发态，本文希望通过s-NIXS技术实现更直接、更少理论依赖的轨道成像方法。
AI.method: 利用s轨道非共振非弹性X射线散射对三种不同价态（Ni³⁺、Ni²⁺、Ni¹⁺）的稀土镍酸盐进行轨道成像实验，包括LaNiO₃、La₂NiO₄和LaNiO₂。
AI.result: 直接揭示了三种镍酸盐的基态轨道构型：三价LaNiO₃的低自旋轨道构型、一价LaNiO₂的d_{x²-y²}构型，以及二价La₂NiO₄畸变八面体环境中有效的e_g晶体场分裂。
AI.conclusion: s-NIXS技术有望成为研究强关联材料基态和激发态的有力工具，可大幅降低对复杂理论分析的依赖。

title: Thermodynamics of bouncing grains
summary: When a horizontal plate vibrates strongly enough, it causes small particles such as sand grains to continually bounce on it and, over time, to diffuse across its surface. This phenomenon is the cause of the well-known Chladni figure, which is drawn by a higher density of grains gathering along the nodal lines of a resonating elastic plate. Using a heterogeneous, non-resonating plate, we investigate experimentally this type of diffusion. We find that, for the most part, is it comparable to classical molecular diffusion. We can define a temperature for the bouncing grains, and the system then obeys the fluctuation-dissipation theorem. We also recover Maxwell-Boltzmann statistics at equilibrium, when temperature is uniform. However, when temperature varies across the vibrating plate, the microscopic details of the grains' dynamics affect their macroscopic behavior: Fick's law, for instance, no longer applies. Instead, our experiments support a new transport relation that was recently proposed to represent diffusion in Chladni's experiment. Finally, we propose an expression for the heat flux associated to the non-equilibrium steady state predicted by this new relation, and test it against observations.

AI.tldr: 本文通过非共振振动板实验，研究了沙粒在振动表面上的扩散行为，发现其与经典分子扩散类似，可定义温度并服从涨落-耗散定理及麦克斯韦-玻尔兹曼统计；但温度不均匀时，菲克定律失效，实验支持一种新的输运关系，并提出了相应的热流表达式。
AI.motivation: 探究振动板上颗粒扩散的物理机制，特别是非共振条件下该现象是否与经典分子扩散类似，以及温度不均匀时扩散行为的变化。
AI.method: 使用非共振非均匀板进行实验，观察沙粒的扩散行为，测量温度分布并检验涨落-耗散定理、麦克斯韦-玻尔兹曼统计、菲克定律及新提出的输运关系。
AI.result: 均匀温度下扩散与经典分子扩散类似，可定义温度并服从涨落-耗散定理和麦克斯韦-玻尔兹曼统计；温度不均匀时菲克定律不再成立，实验支持一种新的输运关系。
AI.conclusion: 振动板上颗粒扩散在均匀温度下可类比分子扩散，但温度梯度下微观动力学影响宏观行为，需要新的输运模型来描述；本文还提出了相应的热流表达式并经实验验证。

title: Ferroelectric brightening of spin forbidden dark excitons in a WSe2/hybrid perovskite heterostructure
summary: Long-lived dark excitons in monolayer WSe2 present promising candidates for carrying spin and valley information, but their optical access and spin manipulation have conventionally required the use of strong external magnetic fields. Here, using a ferroelectric hybrid perovskite heterostructure, we leverage the ferroelectric proximity effect to break the WSe2's in-plane rotational symmetry and brighten the spin-forbidden dark excitons under zero magnetic field conditions. Furthermore, we show that the twist angle between the WSe2 and perovskite crystals controls the ferroelectric coupling strength and valley-contrasting polarization. Our proposed mechanism, supported by a four-band tight-binding model, suggests that the ferroelectric proximity effect induces an asymmetric intersublattice interaction, generating an effective in-plane spin-orbit coupling (SOC) field that rotates spin/valley polarization and brightens dark excitons. Our work establishes ferroelectric proximity coupling as an electrically reconfigurable, magnetic-field-free strategy for spin exciton control in two-dimensional semiconductors.

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用铁电杂化钙钛矿异质结构，通过铁电邻近效应在零磁场条件下亮化WSe₂单层中自旋禁止的暗激子，并通过扭转角控制铁电耦合强度和谷对比极化，建立了一种电可重构、无磁场的自旋激子控制策略。
AI.motivation: WSe₂单层中的长寿命暗激子有潜力携带自旋和谷信息，但传统上需要强外磁场来光学访问和操控自旋，这限制了实际应用。
AI.method: 构建铁电杂化钙钛矿异质结构，利用铁电邻近效应打破WSe₂的面内旋转对称性，在零磁场下亮化暗激子；通过调控WSe₂与钙钛矿之间的扭转角来控制铁电耦合强度与谷对比极化；采用四带紧束缚模型进行理论支持。
AI.result: 实现了零磁场条件下暗激子的亮化，发现扭转角可调控铁电耦合强度与谷对比极化，铁电邻近效应诱导不对称子晶格间相互作用，产生有效面内自旋-轨道耦合场，从而旋转自旋/谷极化并亮化暗激子。
AI.conclusion: 铁电邻近耦合为二维半导体中自旋激子控制提供了一种电可重构、无需磁场的策略，具有潜在的应用价值。

title: Non-adiabatic Ehrenfest dynamics with norm-conserving and ultra-soft pseudo-potentials with nuclear velocity corrections on the atomic orbitals within the Projector Augmented Wave Method framework
summary: We derive the first-principles Ehrenfest molecular dynamics describing non-adiabatic processes with the inclusion of the nuclear-velocity-dependent phases (also known as electron-translation factors) on the atomic-orbital basis. These phases, appearing when nuclei are treated dynamically, affect effective Hamiltonians constructed from localised orbitals. In this work, we focus on the effects in the first-principles pseudo-potential Hamiltonian, both for the norm-conserving and ultra-soft cases, derived within the Projector-Augmented-Wave (PAW) method framework. Peierls-like phases depending on the nuclear velocities appear in the non-local part of the potential, while additional nuclear velocity and acceleration-dependent corrections appear in the ultra-soft pseudo-potential case. The use of velocity-including atomic orbital basis enables a Galilean-invariant description of the non-adiabatic Ehrenfest molecular dynamics, removing spurious non-adiabatic couplings that arise from neglecting the nuclear velocity phases in the atomic orbitals.

AI.tldr: 本文从第一性原理出发，推导了包含核速度依赖相位（电子平移因子）的Ehrenfest分子动力学方法，在原子轨道基组上实现了非绝热过程的伽利略不变描述，并系统分析了PAW框架下模守恒和超软赝势中出现的Peierls-like相位及速度/加速度修正项。
AI.motivation: 现有非绝热分子动力学方法在处理动态原子核时，往往忽略核速度依赖相位（电子平移因子），导致原子轨道基组中出现虚假的非绝热耦合，破坏了伽利略不变性。作者旨在通过引入这些相位修正，实现更准确的非绝热动力学描述。
AI.method: 从第一性原理出发，在原子轨道基组上推导包含核速度依赖相位的Ehrenfest分子动力学方程；在PAW方法框架下，分别处理模守恒和超软赝势两种情形；分析非局域势中的Peierls-like相位以及超软赝势中额外的速度/加速度修正项。
AI.result: 导出了包含核速度相位的有效哈密顿量修正：非局域势中出现Peierls-like相位项；超软赝势中额外出现核速度和加速度依赖的修正项。使用包含速度信息的原子轨道基组可实现伽利略不变的描述，消除因忽略核速度相位而产生的虚假非绝热耦合。
AI.conclusion: 核速度依赖相位对于局域轨道基组的非绝热分子动力学至关重要，引入这些修正可确保理论框架的伽利略不变性，从而获得更准确的非绝热动力学模拟结果。

title: Superconductivity beyond band geometry: emergence of pair quantum geometry
comment: Main text (6 pages, 1 figure), SM (12 pages, 2 figures)
summary: Quantum geometry shapes the effective mass of Bloch particles through the geometric properties of single-particle states. Here we show that this principle extends to paired states. Starting from a generic multiband Hubbard model, we derive an exact effective-mass theorem for two-body bound states and its many-body counterpart for Cooper pairs near the critical temperature within Gaussian fluctuation theory. In both cases, the inverse effective mass separates into a ``conventional'' band-structure contribution and a new geometric contribution, pair quantum geometry, governed by quantum metrics on the pairing manifold, which becomes nontrivial when pairing is non-uniform across sublattices. In the many-body setting, analytic continuation renders the fluctuation kernel non-Hermitian, producing a biorthogonal pair geometry and a generally complex Cooper-pair effective mass whose imaginary part reflects Landau damping. Exact calculations on one-, two-, and three-dimensional lattice models show that pair quantum geometry can make quantitatively significant contributions to the effective mass. These results establish pair quantum geometry as a fundamental ingredient of superconductivity beyond conventional band geometry.

AI.tldr: 本文证明了量子几何形状不仅影响单粒子态的有效质量，也扩展到配对态（如双粒子束缚态和Cooper对）。通过多带Hubbard模型，导出了双粒子束缚态和Cooper对的有效质量定理，发现有效质量由传统的能带结构贡献和新的“配对量子几何”贡献组成。后者在配对不均匀（如不同子格间）时变得显著，且在多体情况下需要双正交几何描述。数值计算表明，配对量子几何对有效质量有显著贡献，是超导中超越传统能带几何的基本要素。
AI.motivation: 探索量子几何对配对态（如超导中的Cooper对）有效质量的影响，填补单粒子态到配对态几何效应研究的空白。
AI.method: 从通用多带Hubbard模型出发，解析推导双粒子束缚态和Cooper对的有效质量定理；利用高斯涨落理论处理近临界温度的Cooper对；通过解析延拓引入双正交几何描述；在1D、2D、3D晶格模型上进行数值验证。
AI.result: 发现配对态有效质量包含传统能带贡献和新的“配对量子几何”贡献；多体情况下有效质量变为复数（虚部反映Landau阻尼）；数值计算表明几何贡献在量上显著。
AI.conclusion: 配对量子几何是超导理论中超越传统能带几何的基本要素，对理解超导体的质量性质具有重要影响。

title: Discovery of hidden order in the Shastry-Sutherland magnet Nd2Be2GeO7
comment: 8 pages, 4 figures for the main text; 5 pages, 6 figures for the supplemental materials
summary: Hidden order typically manifests as a thermodynamic phase transition without a conventional order parameter, leaving its true nature concealed even at the lowest temperatures. In the frustrated Shastry-Sutherland magnet Nd$_2$Be$_2$GeO$_7$, we observe a related yet fundamentally distinct phenomenon. A sharp specific-heat anomaly appears at 250 mK, but zero-field neutron diffraction and muon spin relaxation detect no static magnetism down to 100 and 30 mK, respectively, pointing to a hidden-order state. Remarkably, this hidden order does not emerge under an applied magnetic field, but instead reveals itself only after the field is applied and subsequently removed where magnetic Bragg peaks appear, albeit with strongly suppressed moments. A glassy state is ruled out by ac susceptibility and specific heat measurements. Complementary $μ$SR measurements reveal coherent spin fluctuations at a rate on the order of gigahertz. Taken together, these results suggest that the system lies in close proximity to the quantum spin liquid and long-range magnetic order state such that a small perturbation can effectively drive the system towards distinct ground states. These findings also distinguish Nd$_2$Be$_2$GeO$_7$ from known frustrated systems, establishing it as a unique platform where the synergistic interplay among the spin-orbit coupling, crystal field, and magnetic frustration leads to unexpected quantum states.

AI.tldr: 在Nd₂Be₂GeO₇阻挫磁体中，观察到一种新型隐藏序现象：零场下无静态磁性但在250 mK出现比热异常，而在施加并移除磁场后出现磁布拉格峰但磁矩被强烈抑制，系统靠近量子自旋液体与长程磁有序的临界点。
AI.motivation: 探索阻挫Shastry-Sutherland磁体Nd₂Be₂GeO₇中是否存在隐藏序，并揭示其与常规隐藏序的不同之处。
AI.method: 结合比热、中子衍射、μ子自旋弛豫(μSR)、交流磁化率等实验手段，在零场及施加/移除磁场条件下系统表征样品的磁性质。
AI.result: 在250 mK观察到尖锐比热异常，但零场下直至极低温均无静态磁性；施加并移除磁场后出现磁布拉格峰但磁矩被强烈抑制；μSR显示相干自旋涨落频率在GHz量级，排除了玻璃态。
AI.conclusion: 该体系处于量子自旋液体与长程磁有序的临界点附近，微小扰动即可驱动系统进入不同基态；自旋轨道耦合、晶格场与磁阻挫的协同作用产生了这种独特的量子态。

title: Hidden periodicities allow the prediction of locked particle motions on quasicrystalline surfaces
comment: 6 pages, 4 figures plus 3 pages, 3 figures in supplemental material (included)
summary: Motion of particles across quasicrystalline surfaces exhibits peculiar features due to the presence of long-range order without translational periodicity. Under time-periodic forcing, this motion can become locked in directions thatn deviate strongly from the mean driving direction. We show that for surface potentials with a quasicrystalline pattern of minima generated by a superposition of plane waves, particle trajectories are nonperiodic, yet their mean direction and speed are determined by hidden periodic potentials. The lattice vectors of these underlying potentials define characteristic velocities that dictate both directional and speed locking. The particle motion does not synchronize with the driving, and it is possible for the mean speed to remain nonlocked even in directionally locked states. These findings are demonstrated using a model directly amenable to experimental realization.

AI.tldr: 研究揭示了准晶表面上受时间周期驱动的粒子运动，其平均方向和速度由隐藏的周期势决定，出现方向锁定但速度未锁定等非同步现象。
AI.motivation: 探索准晶表面（具有长程有序但无平移周期性）上粒子的独特运动特性，尤其是时间周期驱动下的方向锁定行为及其背后的机制。
AI.method: 通过平面波叠加生成准晶表面势能图案，理论分析粒子在该势场中受时间周期力驱动的运动轨迹，并找出决定锁定方向与速度的隐藏周期势的晶格矢量。
AI.result: 粒子轨迹非周期；平均方向与速度由隐藏周期势决定；存在方向锁定但速度不锁定的状态；粒子运动不与驱动同步。
AI.conclusion: 准晶表面上的粒子运动呈现出非平凡的方向与速度锁定特性，其底层机制是隐藏的周期势，该发现可通过实验模型实现验证。

title: Stacking-Dependent Magnetism and Tunable Half-Metallicity in Bilayer Janus 1T-MnSSe
summary: We investigate the structural, electronic, and magnetic properties of bilayer Janus 1T-MnSSe using first-principles calculations. Various AA- and AB-type stacking configurations are considered to examine the influence of interlayer registry on magnetic ordering and exchange interactions. The nonmagnetic state is unstable for all stackings, confirming intrinsic magnetism. The AA2 stacking is identified as the ground state and exhibits A-type antiferromagnetic ordering, indicating antiferromagnetic interlayer coupling. Monte Carlo simulations based on an effective Ising model reveal enhanced magnetic transition temperatures in the bilayer relative to the monolayer, with Néel temperatures above 300~K for antiferromagnetic stackings and Curie temperatures up to 250~K for ferromagnetic phases. Several stacking configurations exhibit robust half-metallic ferromagnetism with nearly 100\% spin polarization at the Fermi level. Moreover, the half-metallic state can be tuned and ultimately transformed into a metallic ferromagnetic phase through carrier doping and biaxial strain. These findings establish bilayer MnSSe as a promising platform for controllable interlayer magnetism and spintronic applications in two-dimensional materials.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算研究了双层Janus 1T-MnSSe的结构、电子和磁性质，发现AA2堆叠为基态且呈现A型反铁磁有序，单层相比双层具有更高的磁转变温度（反铁磁Néel温度>300 K，铁磁Curie温度达250 K），多种堆叠表现出近乎100%自旋极化的半金属铁磁性，且可通过载流子掺杂和双轴应变调控。
AI.motivation: 探究双层Janus 1T-MnSSe中不同堆叠方式对磁序和交换相互作用的影响，寻找可控层间磁性及自旋电子学应用的二维材料平台。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理计算分析不同AA型和AB型堆叠构型；基于有效Ising模型进行蒙特卡洛模拟；通过载流子掺杂和双轴应变调控电子结构。
AI.result: AA2堆叠为基态且为A型反铁磁；双层磁转变温度高于单层（反铁磁Néel温度>300 K，铁磁Curie温度达250 K）；多种堆叠具近100%自旋极化的半金属铁磁性；载流子掺杂和双轴应变可将半金属态转变为金属铁磁相。
AI.conclusion: 双层Janus MnSSe是一种有前景的可控层间磁性二维材料平台，适用于自旋电子学应用。

title: Eigenmodes of synthetic antiferromagnetic skyrmions
summary:
We investigate the excitation modes of confined synthetic-antiferromagnetic (SAF) skyrmions using micromagnetic eigenvalue and ringdown simulations.
